adapters.comment_policy: comments create scoped interactions/proposal receipts; source files are not overwritten

adapters.disabled_reason: PDF renderer and stable page/region anchor map are not implemented in the browser-safe demo yet.
DOCX renderer and paragraph anchor map are not implemented in the browser-safe demo yet.

required_runtime_behaviour: Markdown heading anchors are visible in Project Operating Space inspector.
Markdown heading and selected text comments create scoped interactions.
PDF/DOCX actions remain visibly planned or disabled with reasons.
PDF/DOCX anchor UI is preview-read-only until stable anchor maps and renderers exist.
Browser never overwrites source repository documents directly.
